title: Parking prohibitions for tow zones (Sec. TPR-220)

street.description: Street the tow-zone applies to; empty for the blanket prohibitions

restriction.description: Restriction type, normalized lowercase (e.g. 'tow-away zone', 'parking prohibited', 'blanket prohibition')

side.description: Side(s): both/north/south/east/west or compound; empty if unstated

from_point.description: Segment start for 'from X to Y' / 'between X and Y'

segment_detail.description: Full/!pair location phrasing when not a clean from/to (e.g. 'from Hammond Street easterly 300 feet', 'entire length')

schedule.description: Days/times when stated (e.g. 'Monday through Saturday', '8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m., Saturdays included', 'on school days'); empty = at all times

notes.description: Sub-clause origin, blanket flag, or source typo
